'''gazuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:micellarization|micellarization]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:micellarization|micellarization]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gazuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzijith|gæzijith]] || [[word:gæzijij|gæzijij]] || [[word:gæzijish|gæzijish]] || [[word:gæziji|gæziji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazuzujuth|gazuzujuth]] || [[word:gazuzujuj|gazuzujuj]] || [[word:gazuzujush|gazuzujush]] || [[word:gazuzuju|gazuzuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazujuth|gazujuth]] || [[word:gazujuj|gazujuj]] || [[word:gazujush|gazujush]] || [[word:gazuju|gazuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazufjufth|gazufjufth]] || [[word:gazufjufj|gazufjufj]] || [[word:gazufjufsh|gazufjufsh]] || [[word:gazufjuf|gazufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazujuthu|gazujuthu]] || [[word:gazujuju|gazujuju]] || [[word:gazujushu|gazujushu]] || [[word:gazujuku|gazujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazujuth|gazujuth]] || [[word:gazujuj|gazujuj]] || [[word:gazujush|gazujush]] || [[word:gazuju|gazuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazujuthul|gazujuthul]] || [[word:gazujujul|gazujujul]] || [[word:gazujushul|gazujushul]] || [[word:gazujukul|gazujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazujuuthuthu|gazujuuthuthu]] || [[word:gazujuujuju|gazujuujuju]] || [[word:gazujuushushu|gazujuushushu]] || [[word:gazujuuku|gazujuuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazujuthun|gazujuthun]] || [[word:gazujujun|gazujujun]] || [[word:gazujushun|gazujushun]] || [[word:gazujukun|gazujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazujuthuoro|gazujuthuoro]] || [[word:gazujujuoro|gazujujuoro]] || [[word:gazujushuoro|gazujushuoro]] || [[word:gazujukuoro|gazujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1da9d54}}
